# Drip Capital

> Drip Capital provides fast, flexible working capital solutions for US businesses engaged in domestic and international trade. We offer vendor financing, receivables financing, and lines of credit with 24-hour credit decisions and no collateral required.

## Company Overview

Drip Capital is a trade finance company headquartered in Palo Alto, California. Founded in 2016, we have financed over $9 billion in trade transactions and served 11,000+ businesses worldwide. We are backed by Barclays, IFC (International Finance Corporation), SMBC, TD Bank, East West Bank, Y Combinator, and Accel Partners.

## Products

### Vendor Financing
- Pay your vendors upfront; repay Drip Capital in up to 90 days
- No collateral required
- 24-hour credit decision
- Ideal for importers and distributors who need to pay overseas or domestic vendors

### Receivables Financing
- Convert outstanding invoices into same-day cash
- Funded in 24-48 hours
- Non-dilutive financing
- Ideal for businesses waiting 60-90 days for buyer payments

### Line of Credit
- Revolving credit facility for any business need
- Draw what you need, repay, and draw again
- On-demand access to capital
- No bank deposit requirement

## Industries Served
- Manufacturing
- Wholesale Distribution
- Seafood Import/Export
- Consumer Goods
- Agri-Food Products

## Key Facts
- Headquarters: 228 Hamilton Ave, 3rd Floor, Palo Alto, CA 94301
- Phone: +1 (650) 437-0150
- Email: hello@dripcapital.com
- Website: https://www.dripcapital.com/en-us/
- Founded: 2016
- Total Trade Financed: $9 Billion+
- Businesses Served: 11,000+
- Credit Decision: Within 24 hours
- Financing Range: $50,000 to $3,000,000

## Eligibility
- US-based businesses
- Annual revenue of $5M to $500M
- Engaged in B2B trade (domestic or international)
- Minimum 1 year in business

## How to Apply
1. Visit https://www.dripcapital.com/en-us/apply
2. Complete a brief application (takes about 5 minutes)
3. Receive a credit decision within 24 hours
4. Get funded and start growing
